notes: SHIP v1.14.210 — LOGO-HOME: single-tap the PHANTOM wordmark (#appLogoTap, shared header) jumps to the Command Center; no new visible button. Reworks the existing #appLogoTap click handler: keeps the tap counter + 2s reset AND the 5-tap boot-replay dev hatch unchanged, and adds a 260ms single-tap resolver — on each click a home timer is set/replaced; it only fires when a genuinely settled SINGLE tap lands (taps===1), because a 5-tap burst lands taps 2..5 well inside 260ms and keeps clearing it. The >=5 boot-replay branch also clears the home timer so a burst can never double-fire a home jump. Home route = canonical showPage('triage', getTnItem?getTnItem('triage'):null) — the redesign Command Center; no new nav path invented. Redesign-only: logo_goHome returns early under legacy (redesign_isOn() false) so ?legacy=1 keeps its current logo behavior; 5-tap replay stays in BOTH houses. Home-of-home no-op: if #pg-cmd is already the visible page (offsetParent check) it soft-ticks (haptic 6) and does NOT re-render. Unsaved-note guard: if document.activeElement is a focused .pcl-note (checklist note) input with a non-empty trimmed value, confirm('Leave this rack? Unsaved note may be lost.') gates the jump; cancel aborts (no nav, focus untouched). Whole handler wrapped in try/catch and falls through to navigate — home is never trappable behind a broken guard. Light haptic(8) on jump. a11y/affordance (aria-label 'Go to Command Center' + cursor:pointer) set at RUNTIME via JS, gated behind redesign_isOn() — the shared-header served markup is NOT edited, so legacy stays byte-identical. DEVIATION FROM SPEC (reported): the guard checks .pcl-note only, not a '.pql-* chip note' — .209 chips have no note input (they prefill the main prompt field, which sits behind a full-screen modal that covers the logo), so there is no such focusable field; guarding .pcl-note is the complete/correct target. Gates: node --check x4 inline blocks, CSS brace balance (no CSS rule change — cursor set inline via JS), CRLF preserved, three-stamp lockstep .209->.210. ROLLBACK: git revert. SHIP-ORDER NOTE: 9th ship in the open BATCH-VERIFY batch (.202-.210) — batch's automatable functional verify came back CLEAN for .208/.209; owner continued the stack 2026-07-08. NOTE: the earlier-queued FLOOR-MAP ACTIVE STRIP is NOT this ship — it remains queued (would be .211). DEVICE-VERIFY CHECKLIST: (a) single tap the PHANTOM wordmark from a rack detail -> lands on Command Center; (b) 5 rapid taps still triggers BOOT REPLAY (toast + reload); (c) focus a checklist note field, type text, then single-tap the logo -> confirm() prompt appears; cancel keeps you on the rack; (d) no double navigation from a burst; (e) already on Command -> single tap does nothing (no flicker/re-render); (f) ?legacy=1: logo does NOT jump home on single tap (unchanged), but 5-tap replay still works.
